## Summary
Brief description of changes.

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (tool / resource / prompt)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Maintenance

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:run` passes
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md (if user-facing change)
- [ ] Updated README.md (if adding tools/resources/prompts)
